matches.agentDescription: Reviews and applies coupon codes before the order is submitted
Edits the coupon code before checkout discounts are applied
Applies the current coupon code to the in-progress checkout
Saves the current cart, shipping, and payment selections without charging the order
Completes checkout and charges the selected payment method
Removes the Starter Kit line before submitting the order
Opens the archive confirmation dialog for the selected customer
Sends a renewal reminder email to the current customer
Captures the next renewal follow-up note for the selected customer
Stores the current renewal note on the customer record
Show all todo items
Show only active (uncompleted) todo items
Show only completed todo items
Clear all completed todo items
Input field to add a new todo. Type your todo and hit enter.
Toggle all items as completed or active
Open customer actions
Read customer actions menu
Archive customer
Archive customer dialog
View customer

source_inventory.label: Reviews and applies coupon codes before the order is submitted
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICForm agentDescription="Reviews and applies coupon codes before the order is submitted" agentId="checkout.discount_form" agentRisk="low" agentWorkflowStep="checkout.review.discount" style={{ display: "grid", gap: 12 }} >

source_inventory.label: Edits the coupon code before checkout discounts are applied
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICInput agentDescription="Edits the coupon code before checkout discounts are applied" agentId="checkout.coupon_code" agentLabel="Coupon code" agentRisk="low" />

source_inventory.label: Apply coupon
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICButton agentAction="submit" agentDescription="Applies the current coupon code to the in-progress checkout" agentId="checkout.apply_coupon" agentRisk="low" >

source_inventory.label: Save cart
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICButton agentAction="click" agentDescription="Saves the current cart, shipping, and payment selections without charging the order" agentId="checkout.save_cart" agentRisk="medium" >

source_inventory.label: Submit order
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICButton agentAction="submit" agentDescription="Completes checkout and charges the selected payment method" agentId="checkout.submit_order" agentRisk="critical" >

source_inventory.label: Remove Starter Kit
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICButton agentAction="click" agentDescription="Removes the Starter Kit line before submitting the order" agentId="checkout.order_line.remove.line_starter_kit" agentRisk="medium" >

source_inventory.label: Archive customer
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICButton agentAction="click" agentDescription="Opens the archive confirmation dialog for the selected customer" agentId="customer.archive" agentRisk="high" >

source_inventory.label: Send renewal reminder
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICButton agentAction="click" agentDescription="Sends a renewal reminder email to the current customer" agentId="customer.send_renewal_email" agentRisk="medium" >

source_inventory.label: Captures the next renewal follow-up note for the selected customer
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICInput agentDescription="Captures the next renewal follow-up note for the selected customer" agentId="customer.renewal_note" agentLabel="Renewal note" agentRisk="low" />

source_inventory.label: Save renewal note
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICButton agentAction="submit" agentDescription="Stores the current renewal note on the customer record" agentId="customer.renewal_note.save" agentRisk="medium" >

source_inventory.label: All
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICButton as="a" href="#/" className={filter === 'all' ? 'selected' : ''} onClick={(e: React.MouseEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); setFilter('all'); }} agentId="filter-all" agentAction="click" agentDescription="Show all todo items" >

source_inventory.label: Active
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICButton as="a" href="#/active" className={filter === 'active' ? 'selected' : ''} onClick={(e: React.MouseEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); setFilter('active'); }} agentId="filter-active" agentAction="click" agentDescription="Show only active (uncompleted) todo items" >

source_inventory.label: Completed
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICButton as="a" href="#/completed" className={filter === 'completed' ? 'selected' : ''} onClick={(e: React.MouseEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); setFilter('completed'); }} agentId="filter-completed" agentAction="click" agentDescription="Show only completed todo items" >

source_inventory.label: Clear completed
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICButton className="clear-completed" onClick={clearCompleted} agentId="clear-completed" agentAction="click" agentDescription="Clear all completed todo items" >

source_inventory.label: Input field to add a new todo. Type your todo and hit enter.
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICInput className="new-todo" placeholder="What needs to be done?" autoFocus value={title} onChange={(e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => setTitle(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={handleKeyDown} agentId="new-todo-input" agentAction="input" agentDescription="Input field to add a new todo. Type your todo and hit enter." />

source_inventory.label: Toggle all items as completed or active
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICInput id="toggle-all" className="toggle-all" type="checkbox" checked={activeTodoCount === 0} onChange={(e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => toggleAll(e.target.checked)} agentId="toggle-all" agentAction="click" agentDescription="Toggle all items as completed or active" />

source_inventory.label: Customer actions
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <ShadcnAICDropdownMenuTrigger agentId="customer.actions" agentDescription="Open customer actions" agentAction="click" agentRisk="low" >

source_inventory.label: Menu content
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <ShadcnAICDropdownMenuContent agentId="customer.actions.menu" agentDescription="Read customer actions menu" agentAction="read" agentRisk="low" agentRole="menu" >

source_inventory.label: Archive customer
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <ShadcnAICDropdownMenuItem agentId={archiveId} agentDescription="Archive customer" agentAction={agentTokens.archive.action} agentRisk={archiveRisk} agentRole="menuitem" >

source_inventory.label: Review archive impact
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <ShadcnAICDialogContent agentId="customer.archive.dialog" agentDescription="Archive customer dialog" agentAction="read" agentRisk="medium" agentRole="dialog" >

source_inventory.label: View customer
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <ShadcnAICSelectItem agentId={getViewId()} agentDescription={getViewDescription()} agentAction="select" agentRisk="low" agentRole="option" >

source_inventory.label: Send renewal email
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <button data-testid="send-renewal">

source_inventory.label: Skip imported
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <button agentId={importedAgentId} agentDescription="Imported unsupported control">

source_inventory.label: Skip computed
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <button agentId={withComputedKey.badId} agentDescription="Computed key unsupported">

source_inventory.label: Skip helper args
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <button agentId={withArgs("helper")} agentDescription="Helper args unsupported">

source_inventory.label: Skip dynamic
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <button agentId={dynamicId} agentDescription="Skipped dynamic control">
